item.title: Capital One 发布了 VulnHunter，这是一款开源人工智能工具，可以在黑客之前发现软件缺陷
item.summary: Capital One on Thursday released VulnHunter, an open-source, agentic AI security tool that scans source code for exploitable vulnerabilities, maps out how an attacker would reach them, and proposes targeted fixes — all before a single line ships to production. The tool, built internally and now available on GitHub unde
